name: EDU_AI_DEMO
description: Build a temporary school-branded AI chatbot demo from public website content.

spec.question_description: Official school or organization name to show in the demo.
Public website to crawl, for example https://www.unc.edu/.
Optional direct logo image URL. Leave blank to auto-discover.
Where should the temporary demo run?
spec.choices:
artifact
podman
rhel_ai
openshift
openshift_ai
all

spec.question_description: Bounded crawl limit for public pages.
Optional YAML list of specific official URLs to prioritize.
